text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a half marathon being held nearby, so I
drop by to see if I can pick up any useful tips.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I'm watching the race...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Ines Fujin leaps ahead of the pack
straight from the start!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Move, move, move!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm going to run... with all I've got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Strategy for the race? Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I were running, I'd settle in a good position
toward the front, then see how things play out.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I think it's best to go right to the front. Then you
can keep growing and growing your lead!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But if you rush off from the beginning, you may
run out of steam in the latter half.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Do you have a backup plan for that, Ines?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Absolutely, absolutely!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: My backup plan is... believing in myself!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'll exhaust myself! I just need to
go full speed for the whole race and win!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to capture that moment of triumph and run
a race my family can be proud of!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Now's my chaaaaance!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Closing in on the finish line, Ines Fujin
manages to find yet another gear!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The gap just gets wider and wider! Incredible!
Simply incredible!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I... did it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The winner is Ines Fujin! She led the whole way
with astounding speed!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm... almost... there!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Ines Fujin seems to be out of stamina!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Noooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's been passed by the second-place runner! It
looks like Ines Fujin can't keep up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we've got a comeback victory, folks!
Too bad for Ines Fujin, missing it by just a hair!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What did I say? You can't just run on guts alone!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: That's fine! Win or lose, I have no regrets!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I'm not cut out for complex stuff, so all I can do
is push forward with all my might.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: On and on and on again. If I do that...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I might just be able to leave behind my own kind
of sparkle.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Going in with a bang and dashing till the very
end—that's the kind of race I want to run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'd like to say you're way out of hand, but...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: INES! INES!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Based on those cheers, I think you may be right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In the long history of the Twinkle Series, I think
it's finally time for someone like you to shine.
